ogTitle: Casino vs Castle Cove: Climate Safety

heading: Casino vs Castle Cove — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Casino, New South Wales and Castle Cove, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Castle Cove has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Casino (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Casino or Castle Cove safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Casino has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Castle Cove scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Casino scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Castle Cove scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Casino or Castle Cove?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Castle Cove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
